title: [Synth] Introduce Synth dialect boilerplate
body:
As discussed in the last ODM, this commit introduces the Synth dialect as described in issue #8786.  The Synth dialect will serve as the parent dialect for synthesis operations and logic representations like AIG and MIG.

The change is basically mechanical and no effect on existing interface. 

This change adds Synth dialect boilerplate including Synth.td, SynthDialect.h/cpp, and SynthOps.h/cpp files. The synthesis pipeline is moved from lib/Synthesis to lib/Dialect/Synth/Transforms with namespace updated from circt::synthesis to circt::synth. CAPI and Python bindings are updated to use the new Synth dialect structure. The circt-synth tool is updated to use the new library and namespace.

Moving AIG is a follow-up.
